causalAutopsy.notes: The dead 'echo' twin was minted by ThreadlineBootstrap.loadOrCreateIdentityKeys (an orphan identity-keys.json, independent of the canonical identity) and registered on the relay pre-#479. PR #479 unified what an agent ADVERTISES onto the canonical fingerprint but did not touch the SENDER's resolution path — so the client could still resolve a name to the stale twin (silent drop) or throw on same-name ambiguity. This PR fixes the resolution layer; the companion PR removes the orphan-minting source.
